# Reflections

> Private journal for writing and mood notes. AI stays optional and writing comes first.

## What it is
Reflections is a private journal where users write notes, name moods, add tags, and notice patterns over time. AI support runs only when the user chooses it or turns on Smart Mode.

## Who it's for
People who want a quiet place to think in writing, without streaks, public sharing, or AI that runs without being asked.

## Key features
- Private rich-text journal with mood tracking, tags, tasks, and attachments
- Life Wiki: AI-supported pages that grow from saved writing when the user asks
- AI reflections for moments when users want another lens on a note
- Ambient soundscapes, whisper-to-text, focus mode, breathing exercises
- Future Letters: write to your future self
- Available as web app, PWA, and Android APK

## Pricing
- Free: 30 notes/month, one AI reflection sample, one Life Wiki refresh after enough writing
- Pro weekly: ₹49/week after a 3-day trial
- Pro monthly: ₹149/month after a 3-day trial
